name: Sunshine Title Loans
description_short: Sunshine Title Loans provides title loan services in Hollywood, FL, offering quick access to emergency cash using vehicle titles as collateral.
description_long:
Sunshine Title Loans operates as an automotive financing company specializing in title loans in the Hollywood, Florida area. The company is located at 3201 N State Road 7 and can be reached at (954) 322-4442. Title loans are a form of emergency lending where borrowers pledge their vehicle's title as collateral to secure fast cash, typically used for unexpected expenses or short-term financial needs.

The company offers title loan services designed for rapid funding, fitting the emergency-cash category of short-term, collateral-based lending. Based on the Yahoo Local listing, they operate a physical storefront location with extended business hours throughout the week, suggesting accessibility for customers seeking same-day or next-day lending solutions. Their automotive financing model allows individuals with vehicle equity to access funds quickly without requiring traditional credit checks.

Sunshine Title Loans distinguishes itself through local presence and consistent operating hours across the week (Monday-Saturday). The company maintains a dedicated phone line for customer inquiries and operates from a fixed physical location, which can provide reassurance to borrowers seeking in-person interactions for loan transactions. Their weekend availability (Saturday 10 AM-5 PM) offers flexibility for working customers.

As with all title loan providers, this service carries significant caveats. Title loans typically carry high interest rates and fees, and borrowing against a vehicle title creates risk of vehicle repossession if payments are missed. The website content provided does not include specific information about APR rates, loan terms, maximum loan amounts, or fee structures, making it impossible to assess competitiveness. Consumers should carefully evaluate whether this emergency lending option aligns with their financial situation before pledging vehicle collateral.
address: 3201 N State Rd 7 Suite B, Hollywood, FL 33021

pros: Physical brick-and-mortar location in Hollywood, FL providing in-person service
Extended weekday hours (10 AM-6 PM Monday-Thursday) for working customers
Saturday availability (10 AM-5 PM) for weekend access
Direct phone line (954) 322-4442 for customer inquiries
Specializes specifically in title loans, suggesting focused expertise in this lending type
Quick emergency cash access typical of title loan providers
cons: Website content does not disclose APR rates, making cost comparison impossible
No information provided about loan term lengths or maximum/minimum loan amounts
Title loans carry high default risk due to vehicle repossession potential if payments missed
Limited online presence—no standalone website provided, only Yahoo Local listing
No fee structure, prepayment penalties, or other terms disclosed on available information
best_for: Vehicle owners facing immediate cash emergencies with no other credit options
Borrowers with poor credit unable to qualify for traditional personal loans
Those needing rapid funding within 1-2 days who have vehicle equity available
diagnosis: Sunshine Title Loans serves borrowers with vehicle equity facing urgent cash needs and limited credit alternatives. The primary caveat is that title loans carry above-market interest rates and real repossession risk—this option should only be considered after exhausting lower-cost alternatives like credit union PALs or employer advances.
services: Title loans using vehicle as collateral
